name: Win translator
tagline: ai text genrator , translate or refine

name: Poolsuite
author: poolsuite
tagline: 80s summer vacation simulator. Retro visuals, disco funk, VHS aesthetics. The internet's most stylish pool party.

name: Silk
author: weavesilk
tagline: Interactive generative art. Draw with light and symmetry. Every stroke creates a unique, mesmerizing pattern. Zero skill required.

name: Patatap
author: patatap
tagline: Visual + sound instrument. Tap any key, get a beautiful animation and tone. A portable animation and sound kit in your browser.

name: Window Swap
author: window-swap
tagline: Look out of someone else's window. Real video views from real people around the world. Quiet, beautiful, human.

name: Drive & Listen
author: driveandlisten
tagline: Drive through any city with local radio. Tokyo at night, Paris in the rain, LA at sunset. Just pick a city and go.

name: Radio Garden
author: radio-garden
tagline: Spin the 3D globe and tune into live radio from anywhere on Earth. Thousands of stations, one interactive planet.

name: Character.AI
author: character-ai
tagline: Talk to AI characters with distinct personalities. Philosophers, anime characters, historical figures. Or create your own companion.

name: Slow Roads
author: slow-roads
tagline: Procedurally generated driving game. Endless landscapes, no destination, no score. Just you, the road, and the scenery.

name: Pixelarium
author: pixelarium
tagline: Free online pixel art editor. Create retro-style sprites, animations, and scenes directly in your browser. No install, no account.

name: Moodist
author: moodist
tagline: Open-source ambient sound mixer. Blend rain, cafe chatter, fire crackle. Free, no ads, no account. Just focus.

name: IT Tools
author: corentin-thomasset
tagline: 70+ handy online tools for developers. JWT decoder, hash generator, cron parser, UUID generator, base64, and more. All in one clean UI.

name: Carbon
author: carbon-app
tagline: Create beautiful code screenshots. Pick a theme, choose a language, export as PNG. The standard for sharing code on social media.

name: tldraw
author: tldraw
tagline: Infinite canvas for sketching, diagramming, and prototyping. Hand-drawn style with smart snapping. The whiteboard you actually want to use.

name: Excalidraw
author: excalidraw
tagline: Virtual whiteboard with a hand-drawn feel. Sketch diagrams, flowcharts, wireframes. Open-source, end-to-end encrypted.

name: Squoosh
author: GoogleChromeLabs
tagline: Image compression in your browser. Compare codecs side-by-side, tweak quality sliders, see results in real-time. No upload needed.

name: Hoppscotch
author: hoppscotch
tagline: Open-source API development ecosystem. Test REST, GraphQL, WebSocket, and more. The lightweight Postman alternative that runs in your browser.

name: JSON Hero
author: triggerdotdev
tagline: Beautiful JSON explorer. Paste any JSON and get a clean, navigable view with type inference, path copying, and keyboard shortcuts.

name: Ray.so
author: raycast
tagline: Turn code into beautiful images. Syntax highlighting, custom themes, export in multiple sizes. The code screenshot tool for pros.

name: Regex101
author: firasdib
tagline: Build, test, and debug regular expressions. Real-time matching, explanation, and a community library of user-submitted patterns.

name: Stirling-PDF
author: Stirling-Tools
tagline: Self-hosted PDF manipulation hub. Merge, split, convert, compress, watermark, OCR -- 40+ operations in one clean interface.
